situational_context: Running comeback week 5: 4 runs completed (May 3, 9, 15, 18). Run #4 reached 5.0 km (exceeded 3.5 km plan — distance discipline flagged but HR stayed in Z2, avg 140 bpm). Primary modality still e-bike commuting (~38 km/day round trip on sur-site days). Gravel Z2 ride added May 16 (14.3 km, load 17). Chronic load 20.8 (down from 22.3 on May 14 — trailing effect of rest days rolling in). ACWR 0.75, safely in rebuild zone. HRV 7d avg 36 (down from 40, but at 90-day personal baseline — driven by sleep decline, not overtraining). RHR stable at 50 bpm. VO2max running improved to 38.7 (+0.4). Weight continuing to drop: 103.6 kg (vs 104.1 on May 14). Sleep declining: 6.9h avg (vs 7.2h — baby-related fragmentation). Congés May 22. Two sur-site days this week (May 21, 26). Comeback protocol active — consolidate at 5 km before increasing. Next nutritionist RDV May 28 (Lucie UGUEN).

recommendations.text: Consolidate at 5 km for Run #5 (May 23): do NOT increase distance beyond 5 km. Run #4 jumped +43% from Run #3 (3.53 to 5.01 km) — tissue needs to adapt at 103.6 kg body weight before any further increase. If May 21 gravel commute suffer >30, reduce Run #5 to 3-4 km.
recommendations.measurable: Run #5 completed at ≤5 km, no post-run pain lasting >24h

recommendations.text: Prioritize sleep duration: target ≥7h/night. Sleep has dropped from 7.2 to 6.9h avg, contributing to HRV decline (36 vs 40). Earlier bedtime on non-baby-disruption nights. This is the single highest-leverage recovery lever available.

Continue eccentric calf raises 3x/week and Vitamin D supplementation daily. Body weight dropping well (103.6 kg, -1.5 kg over 3 weeks at ~0.5 kg/week) — do not accelerate deficit. Prepare nutrition export for Lucie UGUEN RDV (May 28).
recommendations.measurable: Calf raise sessions logged; weight loss ≤0.5 kg/week sustained; nutrition export ready by May 26

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV weekly avg drops below 33 for ≥3 consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently at 36 (90-day baseline); further decline concurrent with rising RHR would indicate overreach or illness

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if 7d avg drops below 6.5h or ≥3 nights <6h
markers_to_watch.reason: Sleep declining (6.9h from 7.2h); further drops compound recovery deficit and inflate post-run tissue risk at 103.6 kg

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #5 triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #4 distance jump was aggressive (+43%); consolidation run must be pain-free to validate the new 5 km plateau
